title: Atoz Unicorn Dough Set
features: Includes 3 unicorns for you to mould the dough on to and create your own unique designs
6 pots of coloured dough - contains wheat
Spreading tool and plastic sissors also included
description: Product Description Unicorn Stamps and moulds along with 6 coloured pots of Dough Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months. Chocking hazard - small parts.
